judge_constraints: REGRESSION DIAGNOSIS (completion bar: match must land WITHOUT this construct family): Empty if-body construct (line 1618, code6cac.c) fails tests 1+2 and matches the 'empty-body if(cond){} dead-read' forbidden family. Worker should rewrite to 'if (!(D_800A38F8 > D_800A37A0)) { ... }' (or '<=' form) and run verify-oracle to confirm equivalence — if oracle passes the form was benign style; if it fails it was genuinely codegen-dependent and requires deeper analysis.
